content: Netflix: Your account is suspended. Please update your payment details at http://netflix-billing-update-secure.com
Hey it's Mom, I dropped my phone in the toilet. This is my temporary number, can you text me quickly?
threat_indicators: Request to communicate on an unknown number

content: Dear Customer, Your PayPal account has been limited due to suspicious activity. Click here to verify your identity within 24 hours or your account will be permanently locked: [Link]
Your Amazon package tracking ID is 1Z9999999999999999. Expected delivery tomorrow by 8 PM.
This is Officer Smith from the IRS. There is a warrant out for your arrest regarding unpaid back taxes. Call this number immediately to settle the debt or officers will be dispatched to your home.
